title: Dig Out Dinosaur Fossil Jurassic Prehistoric Digging Kit Skeletons - 1 Random
features: Kids glow in the dark dinosaur dig out excavation discovery kit
Great for any dinosaur lover: feel like a real paleontologist as you uncover your own dino!
Glow in the dark: The hidden dinosaurs glow! charge them in direct sunlight or under a bright light to watch them glow when it gets dark.
Includes: Plaster block, digging tools and cleaning brush
description: Product Description Dinosaur excavation digging kit with glow in the dark dinosaur. Use the tools to dig out the dino hidden inside the plaster - pop it under a bright light to charge it and watch it glow in the dark! Suitable for ages 6+. Not suitable for children under the age of 3. Small Parts.WARNING: This item contains tools with functional sharp points and should only be used under adult supervision. Digging into the rocks will create dust and small particles, we recommend that you lay out a cover or newspapers to catch any debris. If any dust comes into contact with eyes, flush thoroughly with cold water. Safety Warning Not suitable for children under 3 years.

specifications_table.Educational Objective(s): ‎Observation Skills, Exploratory Skills, Concept Development Skills
